items.summary: Fix the backend owner principal verification in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and grant admin access by ensuring isCallerAdmin returns true for this principal

Verify the owner principal initialization logic in backend/main.mo correctly stores and compares the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' during canister deployment and authentication checks

Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the caller's principal text representation, the stored owner principal text representation, and the boolean comparison result to diagnose why authentication is failing for the authenticated owner
Update the frontend App.tsx admin route protection to display the exact principal received from the backend isCallerAdmin check in the access denied message for debugging purposes
